accurate.why: Claims match the title 49 / IRC amendments and dates.

states_purpose.why: States it temporarily extends FAA programs, authorities, and trust fund taxes.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes amending title 49 and the Internal Revenue Code to extend expiration dates.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 39% apportionment reduction and obligation-through-Sept-30 condition.

effective_dates.why: Notes the new May 10/May 11, 2024 expiration dates and Oct 1 2023 start.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers AIP funding/apportionment, program extensions, trust fund taxes/expenditure authority, and counter-UAS.

correct_entities.why: FAA, Airport and Airway Trust Fund, DHS counter-UAS all correct.

correct_figures.why: AIP $2.04B, $3.35B annualized, 39% reduction, and other amounts/dates correct.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
